name: Act of Faith
description: This unit gets +{[extraCritChance]}% <style="Stat_Chance">Crit Chance</style> and increases their <style="Stat_CritDamage">Crit Damage</style> by {[extraCritDmgPct]}% each time a friendly <style="Aliance_Imperial">Imperial</style> unit dies or kills an enemy unit. Once this unit crits, this bonus resets.

name: Ambush
description: The first time this unit is defeated, it leaves behind a <style="Decoy">decoy</style> and at the beginning of their next turn, if there is still a friendly decoy on the battlefield, it is resurrected with full <style="Stat_Health">Health</style> on a random friendly decoy and can immediately take a turn. <style="Character">Characters</style> resurrect before <style="NonCharacter">Non-Character</style> units.

name: Battle Fatigue
description: If a friendly unit is defeated in an adjacent hex, there’s a <style="Stat_Chance">{[chance]}% chance</style> that this unit flees and is removed from the battle. <style="Stat_Chance">+{[chance_2]}%</style> if it was <style="Overkill">overkilled</style>.

name: Beast Slayer
description: This unit deals <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmgPct]}% Damage</style> with melee attacks to <style="Big_Target">Big Targets</style> and <style="Vehicle">Vehicles</style>. It also has an added <style="Stat_Chance">{[blockChance]}% chance</style> to <style="Stat_Block">Block</style> Damage equal to its current <style="Stat_Armor">Armour</style>.

name: Beast Slayer
description: Deals +{[extraDmgPct]}% <style="Stat_Melee">melee</style> Damage to <style="Big_Target">Big Targets</style> and <style="Vehicle">Vehicles</style>. Has an added <style="Stat_Chance">{[blockChance]}% chance</style> to <style="Stat_Block">Block</style> {[blockDmgPct]}% of its max Health as Damage.

name: Big Target
description: Due to its size, this unit benefits less from cover but also provides some obstruction to enemy sighting. Does not get any bonuses from <style="Tile_Grass">Tall Grass</style> and <style="Tile_Trench">Trenches</style>. Adjacent friendly units receive <style="Stat_Hits">-1 hit</style> from <style="Stat_Range">ranged</style> attacks, to a minimum of 1. Cannot be displaced.

name: Blessings of Khorne
description: Deals <style="Stat">{[extraDmgPct]}%</style> more damage and receives <style="Stat">{[dmgPctReduction]}%</style> less <style="DMG_Psychic">Psychic Damage</style> for each unit that was defeated in melee this battle. Counts up to a maximum of {[nrOfHeroes]} defeated units.

name: Boss Adjutant
description: This unit takes <style="Stat_Damage">-{[damagePctReduction]}% Damage</style>. At the end of each turn, this unit loses {[damagePct]}% of its current <style="Stat_Health">Health</style> for each time it was attacked that turn.

name: Camouflage
description: <style="Stat_Range">Ranged</style> attacks against this character score <style="Stat_Hits">-1 hit</style>. This increases to <style="Stat_Hits">-2 hits</style> if this character is more than 2 hexes away from the attacker or to <style="Stat_Hits">-3 hits</style> when in <style="Tile_Grass">Tall Grass</style>. Attackers always score at least <style="Stat_Hits">1 hit</style>.

name: Close Combat Weakness
description: Whenever this unit is adjacent – or started the turn adjacent – to enemy units, it deals <style="Stat_Damage">{[dmgPctReduction]}% Damage</style> with <style="Stat_Melee">melee</style> attacks and <style="Stat_Damage">{[dmgPctReduction_2]}% Damage</style> with <style="Stat_Range">ranged</style> attacks.

name: Contagions of Nurgle
description:
This unit is surrounded by an aura that expands over time. Enemies have {[armorReduction]}% <style="Stat_Armor">Armour</style> while in this aura. If they stand in two or more overlapping enemy auras, they have {[armorReduction2]}% <style="Stat_Armor">Armour</style> instead.

Aura:
Round 1-2: <style="Stat_Range">range 1</style>
Round 3-4: <style="Stat_Range">range 2</style>
Round 5+: <style="Stat_Range">range 3</style>

name: Crushing Strike
description: This unit deals <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmgPct]}% Damage</style> with normal <style="Stat_Melee">Melee</style> attacks if it has not moved this turn.

name: Daemon
description: This unit has an additional <style="Stat_Chance">{[blockChance]}% chance</style> to <style="Stat_Block">Block</style> up to {[blockDmgPct]}% of its own current <style="Stat_Damage">Damage</style> stat.

name: Dakka
description: For attacks with <style="Stat_Range">range 3</style> or more, has <style="Stat_Hits">+{[extraHit]} hits</style> if the target is at <style="Stat_Range">range 2</style>.

name: Diminutive
description: Due to its tiny stature, this unit reduces incoming multi-hit attacks by <style="Stat_Hits">{[hitsReduction]} hit</style>, to a minimum of 1.

name: Emplacement
description: This unit always deals <style="Stat_Damage">{[damageModifier]}% Damage</style> in <style="Stat_Melee">melee</style> and its <style="Stat_Range">ranged</style> attacks deal <style="Stat_Damage">+{[damageModifier_2]}% Damage</style> if it has not moved this turn.

name: Explodes
description: This unit <style="Explodes">explodes</style> on death, dealing <style="Stat">25%</style> of its max <style="Stat_Health">Health</style> as <style="DMG_Direct">Direct Damage</style> to all adjacent units

name: Final Vengeance
description: When this unit loses its last <style="Stat_Health">Health</style>, it immediately performs a <style="NormalAttack">normal attack</style> on an eligible target and is then defeated as normal, unless <style="Overkill">Overkilled</style>

name: Flying
description: Can traverse impassable hexes and enemies and move between any elevation.

name: Get Stuck In
description: For every 2 hits this unit scores with an attack against an enemy within range 2, it has a <style="STAT">{[chance]}%</style> chance to score an additional <style="Stat_Hits">hit</style>. If 2 or more friendly <style="Faction_Orks">Orks</style> or 4 or more friendly units are adjacent to the target, the chance is increased to <style="STAT">{[chance_2]}%</style>.

name: Healer
description:
Can <style="Healing">heal</style> a friendly unit as its action.
The amount of <style="Stat_Health">Health</style> restored equals the Healer’s <style="Stat_Damage">Damage</style> multiplied by the highest number of <style="Stat_Hits">hits</style> of any of their weapons.

name: Heavy Weapon
description: When this unit has not moved this turn, it deals <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmgPct]}% Damage</style> with ranged attacks.

name: Immune
description:
This unit is immune to special hexes and <style="HexEffect">hex effects</style>, and cannot have its <style="Stat_Armor">Armour</style>, <style="Stat_Hits">hits</style>, <style="Stat_Movement">Movement</style> or <style="Stat_Range">Range</style> reduced.

Additionally, this unit cannot be <style="Debuff_Stunned">Stunned</style>, <style="Debuff_Pinned">Suppressed</style> or <style="Debuff_Taunted">Taunted</style>, and does not receive knockback damage.

name: Impervious
description: Has to be hit by a <style="Stat_CritDamage">Crit</style> to take any Damage, but is instantly defeated by a <style="Stat_CritDamage">Crit</style>.

name: Indirect Fire
description: Can fire over <style="Out_Of_Sight">obscuring</style> hexes and hit targets in <style="Tile_Trench">Trenches</style>

name: Infiltrate
description: This unit does not trigger <style="Overwatch">Overwatch</style>

name: Instinctive Behaviour
description: This unit always tries to attack the closest enemy unit. If there are targets in range, this unit does not move before attacking.

name: Let the Galaxy Burn
description: All attacks have a <style="Stat">{[chance]}% chance</style> to score an additional <style="Stat_Hits">hit</style> and add <style="Tile_DespoiledGround">Despoiled Ground</style> to the hex of the attacked unit. If the attacked unit is already on a hex with a <style="HexEffect">hex effect</style>, the attack automatically scores an additional <style="Stat_Hits">hit</style> but does not add <style="Tile_DespoiledGround">Despoiled Ground</style>.

name: Living Metal
description: <style="Regenerate">Regenerates</style> <style="Stat">{[hpPct]}%</style> of its max <style="Stat_Health">Health</style> at the start of the players' turn. This unit is also <style="Mechanical">Mechanical</style>

name: Machine of War
description:
<style="MoW">Machines of War</style> stand beside the battlefield and provide two additional powerful abilities to use multiple times during the battle. Some of them cost <style="Resource_MachinesOfWarAmmo">Munitions</style> and some have a <style="Cooldown">cooldown</style> before you can use them. Machines of War cannot be targeted in their off-battlefield position and are destroyed when a battle is lost. 

Not every game mode allows to field Machines of War!

name: Martial Ka'tah
description: <style="NormalAttack">Normal attacks</style> against this unit deal <style="Stat_Damage">-{[dmgReductionPct]}% Damage</style>. This unit deals <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmgPct]}% Damage</style> with all attacks against <style="Summon">Summons</style>.

name: Mechanic
description:
Can <style="Repairing">repair</style> a friendly <style="Mechanical">Mechanical</style> unit as its action.
The amount of <style="Stat_Health">Health</style> restored equals the <style="Mechanic">Mechanic</style>'s Damage multiplied by the highest number of <style="Stat_Hits">hits</style> of any of their weapons.

name: Mechanical
description: Cannot be healed, but can be repaired instead. Note: units with the Living Metal trait also count as being Mechanical

name: Mk X Gravis
description: Any incoming <style="Stat_Damage">Damage</style> has to go through <style="Stat_Armor">Armour</style> a second time. Does not apply to <style="Stat_CritDamage">Crits</style>

name: Object
description: Automatically takes its action, if any, at the beginning of the turn. Cannot be <style="Healing">healed</style> or <style="Repairing">repaired</style>. A player loses the battle if their only remaining units are <style="Object">Objects</style>

name: Overwatch
description: If this unit has not attacked during its turn, nor after that, it attacks when an enemy moves within range during the enemy's turn

name: Parry
description: This unit reduces incoming <style="Stat_Melee">melee</style> multi-hit attacks by <style="Stat_Hits">{[hitsReduction]} hit</style>, to a minimum of 1.

name: Prioritised Efficiency
description:
At the beginning of each turn and until the end of that turn, this unit gains an effect depending on its stance. Whenever a friendly <style="Character">character</style> with <style="PrioritisedEfficiency">Prioritised Efficiency</style> uses an active ability, the stance switches for all friendly units with this trait.

Hostile Acquisition: Deals <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmgPct]}% Damage</style> with all attacks and gains <style="Stat_Movement">+1 Movement</style>.
Fortify Takeover: Takes <style="Stat_Damage">-{[dmgReductionPct]}% Damage</style>.

name: Psyker
description: When this unit performs a <style="NormalAttack">normal ranged attack</style>, it also deals {[extraDmgPct]}% of its <style="Stat_Damage">Damage</style> to a random enemy adjacent to the target.

name: Putrid Explosion
description: This unit explodes when defeated, dealing {[extraDmgPct]}% of its max <style="Stat_Health">Health</style> as <style="DMG_Toxic">Toxic</style> Damage to all adjacent units except to <style="Faction_DeathGuard">Death Guard</style> units.

name: Ranged Specialist
description: If this unit did not start its turn adjacent to an enemy unit, it deals <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmgPct]}% Damage</style> with ranged attacks.

name: Rapid Assault
description: This unit has <style="Stat_Movement">+1 Movement</style> until it makes either a melee or ranged attack. Its first attack each battle and all following attacks it makes in the same turn deal <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmgPct]}% Damage</style>.

name: Resilient
description: If this unit is not already at <style="Stat_Health">1 Health</style> and would be defeated, its <style="Stat_Health">Health</style> is instead reduced to <style="Stat_Health">1 Health</style>, unless <style="Overkill">Overkilled</style>.

name: Shadow in the Warp
description: Enemy <style="Psyker">Psykers</style> within {[range]} hexes deal {[dmgPct]}% <style="DMG_Psychic">Psychic Damage</style>. Does not affect <style="Faction_Tyranids">Tyranid</style> <style="Psyker">Psykers</style>.

name: Steppable
description: Will be destroyed if stepped on or if damaged, but cannot be targeted.

name: Summon
description: Moves and attacks automatically at the beginning of its turn

name: Suppressive Fire
description: An enemy hit by this unit’s ranged attack becomes <style="Debuff_Pinned">Suppressed</style>.

name: Swarm
description:
Attacks with <style="Stat_Hits">1 hit</style> per individual member of the swarm. Each incoming hit can deal <style="Stat_Damage">Damage</style> only to one member. Does not apply to <style="DMG_Blast">Blast Damage</style>.
For each member defeated, the swarm attacks with 1 fewer <style="Stat_Hits">hit</style>. 
<style="Healing">Healing</style> this unit can revive dead members of the swarm.

name: Synapse
description: Friendly units within 2 hexes ignore the effects of <style="Instinctive_Behaviour">Instinctive Behaviour</style> and <style="Battle_Fatigue">Battle Fatigue</style>.

name: Deep Strike
description:
This unit starts the battle in Deep Strike. 

Units in Deep Strike can move to any free hex on the battlefield that is not adjacent to an enemy, or they can move normally from their current position. They cannot be targeted or damaged until they have taken an action or ended their turn.

name: Terminator Armour
description: The first attack each turn against this unit deals <style="Stat">{[dmgPctReduction]}% Damage</style>. <style="Stat_Hits">Hits</style> dealing <style="DMG_Psychic">Psychic</style> or <style="DMG_Direct">Direct</style> Damage are excluded. This unit cannot be <style="Debuff_Pinned">Suppressed</style>.

name: Terrifying
description: Takes <style="Stat">{[defensePct]}% Damage</style> from <style="Stat_Melee">Melee</style> attacks

name: Thrill Seekers
description: Each turn, when this unit takes Damage or targets an enemy with full Health, it becomes Thrilled for {[nrOfRounds]} round. While Thrilled, its Crit Chance is increased by +{[extraCritChance]}% and if it defeats an enemy with a Crit, that enemy is always overkilled.

name: 2-man Team
description: Takes a maximum of <style="Stat">50%</style> of its max <style="Stat_Health">Health</style> in <style="Stat_Damage">Damage</style> from a single <style="Stat_Hits">hit</style>. Does not apply to <style="DMG_Blast">Blast Damage</style>. Once below <style="Stat">50%</style> of its max <style="Stat_Health">Health</style>, cannot be <style="Healing">healed</style> above <style="Stat">50%</style> of its max <style="Stat_Health">Health</style> again.

name: Unstoppable
description: This unit does not have to stop on special hexes and <style="HexEffect">hex effects</style> that would normally force a unit to end their <style="Stat_Movement">Movement</style>.

name: Vehicle
description: This unit does not have to stop on special hexes and <style="HexEffect">hex effects</style> that would normally force a unit to end their <style="Stat_Movement">Movement</style>. Does not get any bonuses from <style="Tile_Grass">Tall Grass</style> and <style="Tile_Trench">Trenches</style>. This unit is also <style="Mechanical">Mechanical</style>.

name: Weaver Of Fates
description: In any turn where 3 or more enemy units have taken <style="DMG_Psychic">Psychic Damage</style>, this unit will deal the maximum possible <style="Stat_Damage">Damage</style> with its attacks and abilities on that turn.
